prompt:
A compact 500 W wind turbine kit laid out for assembly: three blades, a small nacelle, mounting hardware, and an integrated compact controller module arranged neatly on a bench. The parts are clean and modern, with no branding, clearly communicating “kit” rather than an installed turbine.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future renewable DIY aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, tidy layout, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the blade set and nacelle centered and uncluttered for icon clarity.
